CustomField.description: This field is used for NPS Case Escalation after 14 business days
CustomField.formula: CASE( WEEKDAY( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) ), 1, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 18, /* Sun */ 2, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 18, /* Mon */ 3, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 20, /* Tue */ 4, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 20, /* Wed */ 5, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 20, /* Thu */ 6, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 20, /* Fri */ 7, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 19, /* Sat */ DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 20 )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is used for NPS Case Escalation after 14 business days
CustomField.label: Fire After 14 business days
